title: Obsidian & Crying Obsidian Expansion
description: Expand Your Obsidian Builds with: Obsidian Stairs, Fence's, And Slabs!
body:
With the Obsidian and Crying Obsidian Expansion mod you can make your buildings entirely of obsidian! the mod adds the following items:

Obsidian Stairs

Obsidian Slabs

Obsidian Fences

Obsidian Buttons

Obsidian Doors

Obsidian Pane

Obsidian Trapdoor

Obsidian Pressure Plate's

Obsidian Rot's

**All mod items also come with the crying Obsidian variants!**

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![crying](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e73de73baf751e517923b68a32436896a297899.png)

**The crying obsidian variants also glow at night!**

![glow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d09eeb5eb8c3d3eb31e82e362cbc9bd5e234e1b3.png)

![light](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc0c9f71c34a7668a878e5101276de570d62fd77.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod is created with: intellij

#AD
